title.en: PHOSPHATIC FERTILISERS

definition.ko: 과인산화 석회 C05B1/00 습식처리에 의하여 제조되는 것 C05B11/00 화성공정(PYROGENIC PROCESS)에 의하여 제조되는 것 C05B13/00 기타 무기질비료 C05B3/00 ～ 9/00, C05B17/00 유기질비료 C05B15/00, C05B17/00 입상화(GRANULATION) 또는 펠릿화 C05B19/00 인산비료 혼합물 C05B21/00

title.ko: 과인산석회(Superphosphates), 즉 인광석 또는 골인산염을 직접 고상의 생성물로 취득할 수 있는 양 및 농도의 황산 또는 인산과 반응시킴에 의하여 제조되는 비료
title.en: Superphosphates, i.e. fertilisers produced by reacting rock or bone phosphates with sulfuric or phosphoric acid in such amounts and concentrations as to yield solid products directly
Superphosphates
Double-superphosphate; Triple-superphosphate; Other fertilisers based essentially on monocalcium phosphate

title.ko: 과인산석회의 암모니아화(오르토 인산암모늄을 주체로 하는 비료 CO5B 7/00)
title.en: Ammoniation of superphosphates (fertilisers based essentially on ammonium orthophosphate C05B0007000000)
Apparatus for the manufacture of superphosphates
Fertilisers based essentially on di-calcium phosphate (C05B0011000000 takes precedence)
Thomas phosphate; Other slag phosphates

title.ko: 오르토 인산알칼리 또는 암모늄을 주체로 하는 비료(CO5B 11/00이 우선)
title.en: Fertilisers based essentially on alkali or ammonium orthophosphates (C05B0011000000 takes precedence)
Fertilisers based essentially on phosphates or double phosphates of magnesium (C05B0011000000 takes precedence)
Fertilisers produced by wet-treating or leaching raw materials either with acids in such amounts and concentrations as to yield solutions followed by neutralisation, or with alkaline lyes
Pretreatment
using mineral acid
using nitric acid (nitrophosphates)
using sulfuric acid
using orthophosphoric acid
using aqueous hydrochloric acid
using wet gaseous acids
using alkaline lyes

title.ko: 인산질 원료의 화성 처리에 의해 만들어진 비료
title.en: Fertilisers produced by pyrogenic processes from phosphatic materials
from rock phosphates (C05B0013060000 takes precedence)
from metallic phosphorus compounds, e.g. ferro-phosphorus
Alkali or alkaline earth meta- or polyphosphate fertilisers
Organic phosphatic fertilisers (bone meal C05B0017000000)
Other phosphatic fertilisers, e.g. soft rock phosphates, bone meal
containing manganese
Granulation or pelletisation of phosphatic fertilisers other than slag
of superphosphates or mixtures containing them

title.ko: 메인 그룹 1/00부터 19/00 중 2이상의 메인 그룹에 포함되는 인산 비료 혼합물
title.en: Mixtures of phosphatic fertilisers covered by more than one of main groups C05B0001000000-C05B0019000000
